blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
